name: stencil
description: Design system stencil for frontend interfaces. Cut the pattern, lay it out, trim the edges, check the work.

commands.name: cut
commands.description: Cut a new stencil — direction, tokens, component showcase
commands.argument_hint: Optional: what you're building (e.g. "admin dashboard", "analytics app")

commands.name: lay
commands.description: Lay out the stencil — regenerate component showcase

commands.name: trim
commands.description: Trim the edges — tweak tokens, preview, propagate
commands.argument_hint: What to change (e.g. "warmer palette", "rounder buttons", "smaller text")

commands.name: check
commands.description: Hold the stencil against the work — audit code against the design system
